title: List of unlicensed sources
content:
{{Top|real}}
{{Redlink}}
The following is a list of officially recognized publications which included '''unlicensed ''[[Star Wars]]'' material''' or ''[[Star Wars]]'' material whose '''licensing was unable to be confirmed''' by representatives of [[Lucasfilm]]. It does not include ''[[fanon|fanzines]]'' unless an explicit connection to [[Lucasfilm]] is established by the source being referenced by an official [[Lucasfilm]] publication.

As of [[2006]], [[Leland Chee]], had been unable to confirm with certainty whether some publications were officially affiliated with [[Lucasfilm]], nor able to confirm the specifics of some [[Lucas Licensing]] arrangements prior to his tenure at [[Lucasfilm]] and the establishment of the [[Holocron continuity database]].<ref name="SWB">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=222689&start=1575#14229569|thread=Welcome some BCaT VIPs|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2006-02-28|time=6:28 PM}}</ref> 

As a result, some sources listed below have since been established as having some form of licensing arrangement with [[Lucasfilm]] at their time of publication,<ref name="JD">[[Jeux Descartes]]</ref> while others have been identified as never being officially licensed though later directly influencing, or being referenced by, official [[Lucasfilm]] publications. Some sources' licensing authenticity remains undetermined. 

In [[2009]], ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' authors determined that ''locations'' mentioned in sources such as these, published prior to ''The Essential Atlas'' and written by authors who had previously contributed to official ''Star Wars'' products, were to be included in the [[Holocron continuity database]]. [[Jason Fry]], one of the authors of the Atlas, stated that "inclusion shouldn't be taken as a statement of canonicity for anything except the geography",<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/29648348|board=Literature|thread=The Essential Atlas and Galactic Cartography: Official Discussion|user=[[Jason Fry|jasonfry]]|date=2009-01-04|time=7:52 AM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200714135715/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-essential-atlas-and-galactic-cartography-official-discussion.21938930/page-72}}</ref> and later stated that the unlicensed material was not considered canon beyond the planets and systems referenced in the Atlas.<ref name="Status">{{UnlicensedStatus}}</ref>

Articles based wholly on any of the below sources should be marked with the {{Tl|Unlicensed}} tag. Articles with sections sourced from those listed below, based on unlicensed sources, or undetermined licensing, should have page sections denoted with {{Tl|unlicensedstart}} and {{Tl|unlicensedend}}.

==Indeterminate licensing status, pre-''The Essential Atlas''==
